response.content: Hello! I'm the pydantic-ai AI assistant. How can I help you?

I can help you manage and discuss proverbs. I can show you the current list, add new proverbs, replace the whole list, or just chat about them. I can also look up the weather for any location, and change the app's theme color on request.
Here are the proverbs in your list so far: "CopilotKit may be new, but it's the best thing since sliced bread." Would you like to add more, update the list, or discuss one of them?
I can look up the weather for any location! Which city or place would you like to check?

You're currently running against aimock (a mock LLM server). This response is a catch-all for requests that don't match any test fixture. To use a real LLM: (1) Add your OPENAI_API_KEY to .env, (2) Remove or unset OPENAI_BASE_URL from your environment so requests go to OpenAI instead of aimock, (3) Restart with `pnpm dev`.
